reason: 深研5/5支持:ENHANZE皮下注射版税toll-road(JNJ/Roche/Pfizer锁版税66%backlog至2032),FwdPE7.2x最便宜+EV/EBITDA折让30-50%,独立非AI beta,建仓10%
